mod.touhou_maid_affection.name: Touhou Maid: Affection
mod.touhou_maid_affection.description: Kiss your maid! Adds affectionate interactions to Touhou Little Maid.
tips.touhou_maid_affection.kiss: Sneak + empty hand right-click maid to kiss
tips.touhou_maid_affection.kiss_carryon: CarryOn detected: Sneak + empty main hand + item in offhand right-click maid to kiss
tips.touhou_maid_affection.offhand_tempt: Holding temptation items (default: cake) in offhand also attracts maids
effect.touhou_maid_affection.maids_praye: The resonance of affection becomes a devout prayer, infusing your body with vitality. Grants regeneration.
effect.touhou_maid_affection.life_link.d: The crimson thread of fate interweaves your lives. Your maid shares your burden of pain through a virtual soul shield, scaling with affection. She will never perish from this bond.
